chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 389 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of MA No.3196/2024 (S/A) 31.10.2024 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Applicants Mr. Ubedullah Malano, Advocate for private respondent Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional PG for the State O R D E R ZULFIQAR ALI SANGI, J:- Through instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application, the applicants/proposed accused have challenged the order dated 08.07.2024 passed by Additional Sessions Judge-II/ Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Naushahro Feroze on the application filed by the private respondent under Section 22-A & 22-B CrPC for registration of FIR in respect of a cognizable offence alleged to have committed by the proposed accused. Learned counsel for the applicants/proposed accused submits that several FIRs were registered against the son of private respondent, therefore, to save the skin of her son, she wants to register a false FIR against the applicants/proposed accused though they have not committed such offence. In this regard he has placed on record copies of the FIRs. Counsel for the private respondent and learned Addl. PG supported the impugned order and prayed for dismissal of instant application by contending that the allegations leveled by the private respondent against the applicants/proposed accused are serious in nature, for which investigation is necessary. Heard learned counsel for the applicants/proposed accused, learned counsel for the private respondent and learned Addl: PG for the State and perused the material available on

PG supported the impugned order and prayed for dismissal of instant application by contending that the allegations leveled by the private respondent against the applicants/proposed accused are serious in nature, for which investigation is necessary. Heard learned counsel for the applicants/proposed accused, learned counsel for the private respondent and learned Addl: PG for the State and perused the material available on Page 2 of 2 record. Perusal of the impugned order reflects that the learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace has discussed each and every aspect of the case. The allegations against the applicants/proposed accused are serious in nature, which are to be investigated through an honest police officer. No illegality or infirmity is found in the impugned order therefore, it does not call for any interference by this Court. Resultantly, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI
